project_name: The Loneliness Economy: The Price of Isolation

scenes.text: Economists estimate loneliness costs billions in lost productivity and health care.
scenes.bg_prompt: An empty office cubicle in a vast corporate floor, fluorescent lights flickering

scenes.text: Our bodies respond to isolation with stress, inflammation, and heart disease.
scenes.bg_prompt: X-ray style animation of a human heart glowing red with heat, dark background

scenes.text: The erosion of public spaces like parks and cafes further drives us inside.
scenes.bg_prompt: A neglected park bench with overgrown grass and a 'closed' sign on a gate

scenes.text: Delivery culture allows us to survive without ever interacting with a neighbor.
scenes.bg_prompt: A brown cardboard box sitting on a doorstep, seen through a security doorbell camera

scenes.text: We have replaced communal dining with solitary screen time.
scenes.bg_prompt: A person eating noodles while staring intensely at a laptop, glowing screen, dim room

scenes.text: Parasocial relationships with influencers provide a false sense of friendship.
scenes.bg_prompt: A ring light reflected in the eyes of a person watching a video, bright and saturated

scenes.text: We donate to strangers online while our actual neighbors remain unknown.
scenes.bg_prompt: A digital 'Top Donor' badge appearing on a livestream chat, colorful and animated

scenes.text: Corporate wellness programs are often just band-aids for systemic burnout.
scenes.bg_prompt: A sterile office breakroom with a small plant and a poster saying 'Breathe', cold lighting

scenes.text: Designing cities for cars instead of people has fueled this isolation.
scenes.bg_prompt: A massive gray highway intersection with no sidewalks, heavy traffic, smoggy air

scenes.text: The real solution isn’t found in an app store or a rental service.
scenes.bg_prompt: A hand deleting a colorful app from a phone screen, bright natural light

scenes.text: True connection requires vulnerability, time, and physical presence.
scenes.bg_prompt: Two friends sitting on a park bench talking, golden hour sunlight, trees in background

scenes.text: It is something that cannot be bought, only built.
scenes.bg_prompt: A community garden with diverse people working together, vibrant greens and earthy tones

scenes.text: In a world profiting from our isolation, choosing community is a radical act.
scenes.bg_prompt: A massive group of people holding hands in a circle, top-down drone shot, cinematic

warnings: ⚠️  Total duration 158s (2.6 min) is outside target range 10-12 min!
